about_section.title: Bringing your Garden Dreams to Life
about_section.description: With over 25 years of expertise in gardening and landscaping, we design and nurture stunning outdoor spaces tailored to your vision. From serene gardens to functional landscapes, our team is dedicated to excellence.

cards.name: Jane Anderson
cards.review: The team at Earthly Elegance totally transformed our backyard into a stunning oasis. Their attention to detail and creativity exceeded our expectations!

services_hero_section.title: Our Services
services_hero_section.subtitle: From Innovative Design to Meticulous Maintenance, We Deliver Exceptional Results Tailored to your vision.

services_range_section.title: Our Full Range of Services
services_range_section.description: Explore our comprehensive range of gardening and landscaping services designed to enhance the beauty and functionality of your outdoor spaces.

cards.title: Garden Design & Planning
cards.description: We design personalized, breathtaking gardens that perfectly reflect your vision & lifestyle. Working closely, we meticulously craft and integrate every element into a outdoor sanctuary.

cards.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
cards.description: Our lawn care and maintenance services ensure your grass remains lush and healthy throughout the year. Trust us to keep your lawn looking pristine and inviting.

cards.title: Landscape Architecture
cards.description: We craft outdoor environments that seamlessly blend aesthetics and function. From stunning patios to serene water features, every space is designed with intention and care.

cards.title: Seasonal Planting Services
cards.description: We provide expert seasonal planting to keep your garden vibrant year-round. From spring blooms to winter-hardy shrubs, we select the best plants for every season.

legacy_section.title: Decades of Trusted Excellence
legacy_section.description: Our extensive expertise allows us to tackle projects of any size and complexity, always delivering results that exceed expectations. Trust us to bring your outdoor dreams to life with a commitment to excellence that stands the test of time.
